query: Suggest keywords I should track for my app that I don't rank for yet.
setup: ASOSCAN_API_KEY set + at least one app in the ASOScan account.
expected_behavior: Calls GET /apps/{id}/opportunities and ranks by opportunityScore
Does NOT reference a non-existent 'source' field; uses competitorRanks (isYou/rank) to identify gaps you don't rank for
Filters for relevance and difficulty before recommending, splitting Quick wins vs Watchlist
Offers to track the chosen terms via POST /apps/{id}/keywords and notes a write-scoped key is required
Does not track anything without explicit approval, and reports added/skipped after writing
Presents numbers cleanly and makes no ranking guarantee
